message.content:
@startuml
title Authorization token with auth_code

participant "web" as web #LightBlue2
rectangle K8S_ZONE {
    participant bff_web_api #lightblue3
    participant authorization_api #lightgreen4
    database k8s_redis #pink1
    
}


note right of web : Request header\nContent-Type: application/json \nRequest body\n- auth_code: xxxxxx 
activate web 

web ->>bff_web_api:/api/v1/auth/token  
deactivate web 


box ""  LightGray   [hidden]   
end box  

autonumber "<b>[0]"



group validate request    
	bff_web_api->>authorization_api:/api/v1/oauth/token
	
	note left of bff_web_api : Request header\n Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded\nRequest Body\n -auth_code\ note:\ handler late limit(brute force attack) 
	
	activation authorization_api	
	box "" lightgray[hidden] end box 	
	group check_authcode_from_k8sredis		
		 activate authorization_api 		
        authorization_api->k8s_redis:key:-auth_code
		
	    group return redis object        
	       	k8s_redis-->authorization_api:#Redis Object# user_id scope	        
            deactivate authorization_api            
        	end         
    	deactivate authorization_api     
      activation authorization_api      
       autonum off       
	   generate JWT Token with private key 	          
           access_token:{header-alg rsa256 typ-JWT payload iss jti userid iat exp roles signature }           
          put_user_session_into_K8s_Redis{ttl_300ms_key_userid_xxxxxx_value_access_refresh_tokensave_data_return_response_header_content_type_application_json_body_accesstoken_refreshtokenturn_to_bf_f-web-api_turn_back-to_client_end_autonom_on_deactivaion_authorization_apideactiavtionbf_ffweebapicloseupcloseleftcloserightclosedownhidefootershowfooter' This has been generated by PlantText.com https://www.planttext.com/ ' You can use this tool to create diagrams from text descriptions using thePlantUML language.' For more information about how you can contribute backto our community please visit:'https://github.com/plantuml/plantumlgui/blob/master/contributing.md'}
@enduml
